creator: cam@vasteel.io
text:
On 14.1-RELEASE-p6, build seemingly completes, but installation fails due to missing files:

make install
===>  Installing for boost-libs-1.86.0
===>  Checking if boost-libs is already installed
===>   Registering installation for boost-libs-1.86.0
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/devel/boost-libs/work/stage/usr/local/lib/cmake/boost_stacktrace_from_exception-1.86.0/boost_stacktrace_from_exception-config-version.cmake:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/devel/boost-libs/work/stage/usr/local/lib/cmake/boost_stacktrace_from_exception-1.86.0/boost_stacktrace_from_exception-config.cmake:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/devel/boost-libs/work/stage/usr/local/lib/cmake/boost_stacktrace_from_exception-1.86.0/libboost_stacktrace_from_exception-variant-shared.cmake:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/devel/boost-libs/work/stage/usr/local/lib/cmake/boost_stacktrace_from_exception-1.86.0/libboost_stacktrace_from_exception-variant-static.cmake:No such file or directory
